idea-plugin.name: BuildBell
idea-plugin.description:
Get notified by sound when your Gradle build finishes. BuildBell plays distinct audio cues on success and failure, so you can stay focused on other tasks without watching the IDE.

  • Distinct sounds — separate tones for build success and build failure
  • Automatic — works immediately after installation, no configuration required
  • Audio-only — no popups or UI modifications, just audio feedback

Note: Speakers or headphones must be connected and volume turned on.

Report an issue · Source code
